name: Oversize Washed Cotton Velvet Lumbar Throw Pillow Terracotta Pink - Threshold™: Indoor Decorative Cushion, 20x14", Hidden Zipper
description:
Bring a stunning splash of color to your living room decor with this Terracotta Pink Oversized Washed Cotton Velvet Lumbar Throw Pillow from Threshold™. Featuring a soft and smooth, 100% cotton velvet shell with soft filling, this oversized lumbar pillow adds comfort and style to any chair, sofa or bed it's tossed on. Best of all, it's designed with a hidden zip closure for easily removing the pillow cover. Designed in a terracotta pink hue with a washed finish, it's sure to complement a variety of decor styles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
